pi_items.source: setup_task.sh SQL procedure source code and export_result.sh log validation string
task.json description and verifier.py evidence_path check

privileged_info_summary: The task dynamically provisions a synthetic Oracle database schema containing a bank_accounts table with user 1001 (balance $1000) and user 1002. A legacy PL/SQL procedure PROCESS_TRANSFER is generated, which logs the substring 'Insufficient funds' when a transfer causes a negative balance but loses it on rollback. The task specifically requires attempting a $5000 transfer from user 1001 to 1002 to trigger this failure and mandates capturing the preserved error logs to /home/ga/Desktop/audit_evidence.txt.
